items.name: The Waterloo Burger (GFA)
items.description: Derbyshire Beef burger sourced locally with cheddar, smoked bacon & onion jam served with beef dripping fries.

items.name: Beer Battered Haddock and Chips (GFA)
items.description: Fresh haddock fillet in Waterloo batter with beef dripping chips. Mushy peas and tartre sauce

items.name: Derbyshire Rib Eye Steak (GF)
items.description: 8oz locally sourced ribeye steak with garlic butter fresh tomato, watercress and fries.

items.name: Belly Pork (GF)
items.description: Locally sourced. Served with mash, seasonal veg, a rhubard & port compote.

items.name: Home made Derbyshire steak and ale pie
items.description: A real winner ! A delicious slice of homemade pie. Local beef in rich ale gravy baked in a buttery shortcrust. Chips and greens,

items.name: Homemade Cheese and Onion Pie (V)
items.description: A delicious slice of Homemade mature cheddar and caramelised onion shortcrust pie. Chips and baked beans (or greens)

items.name: Roast Butternut Squash Wellington
items.description: Waterloo battle of roasted butternut squash, chips and seasonal veg.

items.name: The Waterloo Toastie
items.description: Derbyshire ham, mature cheddar & wholegrain mustard mayo on a farmhouse bloomer

items.name: Brie & Cranberry Ciabatta
items.description: Peak brie, house cranberry chutney & rocket on a rustic ciabatta

items.name: Beef & Blue Ciabatta
items.description: Derbyshire Beef mixed with rich gravy, Peak Blue & onion jam on a toasted ciabatta

items.name: The Ultimate Tuna Melt
items.description: Tuna with melted cheddar, rocket in a toasted brioche

items.name: The Waterloo Chip Butty
items.description: Triple-cooked beef dripping chips, Peak cheddar & house onion gravy in a toasted brioche

items.name: Vegan Roast Pepper & Pesto Ciabatta
items.description: Roasted red pepper with Vegan Cheese, Spinach & Vegan Basil Pesto in a Warm Ciabatta
